_doc: Shared pipeline-stage queue for Models Bot (Agent B). Statuses: ⬜ todo, 🔄 in-progress, ✅ done, ⛔ blocked. TrendFlow Bot (Agent A) works the DataProcessor side; do not edit A's checklists here.

stages.note: v0-real schema: baseline list minus brand/car/place/face_identity stubs + object-detection text/logo semantics; structural/metadata columns pruned
walks result_store per-run via manifest, reuses npz_features.py; 26 rows / 6 videos / 971 feat cols on current store
reads HF snapshot shards, y=log1p(delta) @7/14/21d, masks; real-target math unit-validated
deterministic channel_id for non-leaking split; currently all fall back to video_id (no channel metadata in local manifests)
train_baseline.py run AS-IS (no code changes needed); 6 heads, sklearn HistGB; metrics non-NaN val+test
passed: 0 leaked target/mask, 0 forbidden-source, 0 unmapped of 918 features

stages.blocked_on: Fetcher HF collection: day 7/14/21 follow-up snapshots not gathered yet (calendar time). add_targets.py ready; re-run when snapshots land.
stages.note: REAL model impossible until follow-up snapshots exist

stages.depends_on: TrendFlow Bot AUTOMATED_TEST_CORPUS_PROTOCOL.md corpus + full DP runs producing result_store artifacts

stages.note: Python 3.14 has no catboost/lightgbm wheels in Models/.venv yet; used sklearn HistGB for smoke. Add when wheels available or pin py3.11 venv
bump feature_schema_version to v1 once identity bases + object_detections re-labelled weights mature (portfolio §8)
